description: Choropleth map illustrating the geographic distribution of LUCAS (Land Use/Cover Area frame Survey) crop sampling points across Europe for the year 2018. The map displays the European continent, including EU Member States and surrounding countries, with land areas shown in grey and national borders outlined in white. Individual sampling locations are represented by small yellow-orange circular markers. The distribution shows a high density of LUCAS crop points across Central and Western European Member States, including France, Germany, Poland, Italy, and Spain. Significant concentrations are also visible in the Nordic countries (Sweden, Finland), Eastern Europe (Romania, Hungary), and the British Isles. The points represent LUCAS survey information with crop type data.
